---
title: "post-processing"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-24"
---

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(sva)

```

```{r}
rna_matrix_genes_2 <- rna_matrix_genes[, samplesheet_filtered1$sample_id]
identical(colnames(rna_matrix_genes_2), samplesheet_filtered1$sample_id)
dim(rna_matrix_genes_2)
dim(samplesheet_filtered1)
```


```{r}
# 1️⃣ PCA (Check for Batch Effect)
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = round(rna_matrix_genes), colData = , design = ~ condition)
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
rna_matrix_vst <- assay(vsd)
pca_res <- prcomp(t(scale(rna_matrix_vst)))  # PCA

```


```{r}
rna_matrix <- as.matrix(rna_matrix_genes)  # Ensure it's a matrix

```

```{r}
rna_matrix_genes <- rna_matrix_genes[, !grepl("\\.", colnames(rna_matrix_genes))]
rna_matrix_genes

```



```{r}
samplesheet_filtered1 <- samplesheet_filtered1[-c(457, 409, 264, 527), ]
samplesheet_filtered1
```


```{r}

rna_matrix_genes_2 <- rna_matrix_genes[, match(samplesheet_filtered1$sample_id, colnames(rna_matrix_genes))]

identical(colnames(rna_matrix_genes_2), samplesheet_filtered1$sample_id)  # Should return TRUE

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
samplesheet2 <- samplesheet
samplesheet2 <- samplesheet2 %>% select(class, Project.ID)
samplesheet2

```

```{r}
identical(rownames(samplesheet2), colnames(rna_matrix_genes_2))
```

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(DESeq2)

# Ensure metadata contains only relevant columns
samplesheet2 <- samplesheet %>% select(class, Project.ID)

# Convert character columns to factors
samplesheet2 <- samplesheet2 %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.factor))

# Set row names to match column names in RNA matrix
rownames(samplesheet2) <- rownames(samplesheet)

# Ensure row names match column names in RNA matrix
if (!identical(rownames(samplesheet2), colnames(rna_matrix_genes_2))) {
  stop("Mismatch between samplesheet2 row names and rna_matrix_genes_2 column names!")
}

# Convert RNA matrix to numeric matrix
rna_matrix_genes_3 <- as.matrix(rna_matrix_genes_2)

# Create DESeq2 dataset
dds_default <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(rna_matrix_genes_3),  # Round for integer counts
  colData = samplesheet2,                 # Ensure row names match colnames
  design = ~ class + Project.ID            # Adjust based on experimental design
)

dds_default


```

```{r}
res_def <- 
```

```{r}
#dds_default_2 <- DESeq(dds_default)  # DESeq2's internal normalization
library(DESeq2)
# Get normalized counts
rna_matrix_normalized_final <- counts(dds_default_2, normalized = TRUE)

#dds_default_2
rna_matrix_normalized_final

```

```{r}


resultsNames(dds_default_2) # lists the coefficients
#res <- results(dds, name="condition_trt_vs_untrt")
```

```{r}
levels(dds_default_2$class)
```

```{r}
res_nonMT_vs_N <- results(dds_default_2, contrast = c("class", "nonMT", "N"))
res_MT_vs_N <- results(dds_default_2, contrast = c("class", "MT", "N"))
res_MT_vs_nonMT <- results(dds_default_2, contrast = c("class", "MT", "nonMT"))


```


```{r}
library(plotly)

volcano_plotly <- function(res, title = "Volcano Plot") {
  # Convert results to data frame
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  res_df$gene <- rownames(res_df)  # Add gene names
  
  # Compute -log10(adjusted p-value)
  res_df$log10_padj <- -log10(res_df$padj)
  
  # Assign colors based on significance criteria
  res_df$Significance <- "Not Significant"
  res_df$Significance[res_df$log2FoldChange > 0 & res_df$log10_padj > 1] <- "Upregulated"
  res_df$Significance[res_df$log2FoldChange < 0 & res_df$log10_padj > 1] <- "Downregulated"
  
  # Count the number of upregulated and downregulated genes
  up_count <- sum(res_df$Significance == "Upregulated", na.rm = TRUE)
  down_count <- sum(res_df$Significance == "Downregulated", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Define significance labels with counts
  significance_labels <- c("Not Significant", 
                           paste0("Upregulated (n=", up_count, ")"), 
                           paste0("Downregulated (n=", down_count, ")"))
  
  # Define correct color mapping
  color_mapping <- setNames(c("gray", "red", "blue"), significance_labels)
  
  # Update significance labels in data frame
  res_df$Significance <- factor(res_df$Significance, 
                                levels = c("Not Significant", "Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
                                labels = significance_labels)
  
  # Select the top 10 genes with the highest -log10(padj) for labeling
  top_genes <- res_df[order(-res_df$log10_padj), ][1:10, ]
  
  # Create plot
  p <- plot_ly(res_df, 
               x = ~log2FoldChange, 
               y = ~log10_padj, 
               text = ~paste("Gene:", gene, "<br>Log2FC:", round(log2FoldChange, 3), "<br>p-adj:", signif(padj, 3)),
               mode = "markers",
               marker = list(size = 6),
               color = ~Significance,
               colors = color_mapping) %>%
    layout(title = title,
           xaxis = list(title = "Log2 Fold Change"),
           yaxis = list(title = "-log10 Adjusted P-value"),
           hovermode = "closest")
  
  # Add gene labels for the top 10 significant genes (without triangle)
  p <- p %>%
    add_annotations(
      x = top_genes$log2FoldChange,
      y = top_genes$log10_padj + 0.1,  # Slight offset to move labels above the dots
      text = top_genes$gene,
      showarrow = FALSE,
      font = list(size = 12)  # Adjust font size if needed
    )
  return(p)
}



```


```{r}
library(plotly)

volcano_plotly <- function(res, title = "Volcano Plot") {
  # Convert results to data frame
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  res_df$gene <- rownames(res_df)  # Add gene names
  
  # Compute -log10(adjusted p-value)
  res_df$log10_padj <- -log10(res_df$padj)
  
  # Assign colors based on significance criteria
  res_df$Significance <- "Not Significant"
  res_df$Significance[res_df$log2FoldChange > 0 & res_df$log10_padj > 1] <- "Upregulated"
  res_df$Significance[res_df$log2FoldChange < 0 & res_df$log10_padj > 1] <- "Downregulated"
  
  # Count the number of upregulated and downregulated genes
  up_count <- sum(res_df$Significance == "Upregulated", na.rm = TRUE)
  down_count <- sum(res_df$Significance == "Downregulated", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Define significance labels with counts
  significance_labels <- c("Not Significant", 
                           paste0("Upregulated (n=", up_count, ")"), 
                           paste0("Downregulated (n=", down_count, ")"))
  
  # Define correct color mapping
  color_mapping <- setNames(c("gray", "red", "blue"), significance_labels)
  
  # Update significance labels in data frame
  res_df$Significance <- factor(res_df$Significance, 
                                levels = c("Not Significant", "Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
                                labels = significance_labels)
  
  # Select the top 10 genes with the highest -log10(padj) for labeling
  top_genes <- res_df[order(-res_df$log10_padj), ][1:10, ]
  
  # Create plot
  p <- plot_ly(res_df, 
               x = ~log2FoldChange, 
               y = ~log10_padj, 
               text = ~paste("Gene:", gene, "<br>Log2FC:", round(log2FoldChange, 3), "<br>p-adj:", signif(padj, 3)),
               mode = "markers",
               marker = list(size = 6),
               color = ~Significance,
               colors = color_mapping) %>%
    layout(title = title,
           xaxis = list(title = "Log2 Fold Change"),
           yaxis = list(title = "-log10 Adjusted P-value"),
           hovermode = "closest",
           shapes = list(
             list(
               type = "line",
               x0 = min(res_df$log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE),
               x1 = max(res_df$log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE),
               y0 = 2,
               y1 = 2,
               line = list(color = "black", width = 2, dash = "dash")  # Dashed black line
             )
           )
    )

  # Add gene labels for the top 10 significant genes (without triangle)
  p <- p %>%
    add_annotations(
      x = top_genes$log2FoldChange,
      y = top_genes$log10_padj + 0.1,  # Slight offset to move labels above the dots
      text = top_genes$gene,
      showarrow = FALSE,
      font = list(size = 12)  # Adjust font size if needed
    )
  return(p)
}

```


```{r}
volcano_plotly(res_MT_vs_N, title = "Volcano Plot for nonMT vs N")

```


```{r}
vp_MT_nonMT <- volcano_plotly(res_MT_vs_nonMT, top = 20,title = "Volcano Plot for MT vs nonMT")
vp_MT_nonMT
```

```{r}

library(plotly)

volcano_plotly <- function(res, top=15, title = "Volcano Plot") {
  # Convert results to data frame
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  res_df$gene <- rownames(res_df)  # Add gene names
  
  # Compute -log10(adjusted p-value)
  res_df$log10_padj <- -log10(res_df$padj)
  
  # Assign colors based on significance criteria
  res_df$Significance <- "Not Significant"
  res_df$Significance[res_df$log2FoldChange > 0 & res_df$log10_padj > 2] <- "Upregulated"
  res_df$Significance[res_df$log2FoldChange < 0 & res_df$log10_padj > 2] <- "Downregulated"
  
  # Count the number of upregulated and downregulated genes
  up_count <- sum(res_df$Significance == "Upregulated", na.rm = TRUE)
  down_count <- sum(res_df$Significance == "Downregulated", na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Define significance labels with counts
  significance_labels <- c("Not Significant", 
                           paste0("Upregulated (n=", up_count, ")"), 
                           paste0("Downregulated (n=", down_count, ")"))
  
  # Define correct color mapping
  color_mapping <- setNames(c("gray", "red", "blue"), significance_labels)
  
  # Update significance labels in data frame
  res_df$Significance <- factor(res_df$Significance, 
                                levels = c("Not Significant", "Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
                                labels = significance_labels)
  
  # Select the top 10 genes with the highest -log10(padj) for labeling
  top_genes <- res_df[order(-res_df$log10_padj), ][1:top, ]
  
  # Create plot
  p <- plot_ly(res_df, 
               x = ~log2FoldChange, 
               y = ~log10_padj, 
               text = ~paste("Gene:", gene, "<br>Log2FC:", round(log2FoldChange, 3), "<br>p-adj:", signif(padj, 3)),
               mode = "markers",
               marker = list(size = 6, line = list(width = 1, color = "black")),  # Added outline
               color = ~Significance,
               colors = color_mapping) %>%
    layout(title = title,
           xaxis = list(title = "Log2 Fold Change"),
           yaxis = list(title = "-log10 Adjusted P-value"),
           hovermode = "closest",
           shapes = list(
             list(
               type = "line",
               x0 = min(res_df$log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE),
               x1 = max(res_df$log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE),
               y0 = 2, 
               y1 = 2, 
               line = list(color = "black", dash = "dash", width = 1)
             )
           )
    )
  
  # Add gene labels for the top 10 significant genes (positioned above the points)
  p <- p %>%
    add_annotations(
      x = top_genes$log2FoldChange,
      y = top_genes$log10_padj + max(res_df$log10_padj) * 0.03,  # Offset dynamically based on y-axis range
      text = top_genes$gene,
      showarrow = FALSE,
      font = list(size = 12, color = "black"),
      align = "center"
    )

  return(p)
}


```





```{r}
#filter
library(dplyr)

# Convert DESeqResults to a data frame
res_MT_nonMT_df <- as.data.frame(res_MT_vs_nonMT)

# Filter significant results
res_MT_nonMT_sig <- res_MN_nonMT_df %>% filter(padj < 0.01)
res_MT_nonMT_sig


```


```{r}
# Convert DESeqResults objects to data frames
res_MT_vs_N_df <- as.data.frame(res_MT_vs_N)
res_nonMT_vs_N_df <- as.data.frame(res_nonMT_vs_N)

# Filter rows based on rownames present in res_MN_nonMT_df
filtered_res_MT_vs_N <- res_MT_vs_N_df[rownames(res_MT_vs_N_df) %in% rownames(res_MT_nonMT_sig), ]
filtered_res_nonMT_vs_N <- res_nonMT_vs_N_df[rownames(res_nonMT_vs_N_df) %in% rownames(res_MT_nonMT_sig), ]

filtered_res_nonMT_vs_N
filtered_res_MT_vs_N

```

```{r}
vp_MT_N <- volcano_plotly(filtered_res_MT_vs_N, title = "Volcano Plot MT vs N")
vp_MT_N
```

```{r}
vp_MT_N <- volcano_plotly(filtered_res_nonMT_vs_N, title = "Volcano Plot nonMT vs N")
vp_MT_N

```


```{r}
genes_to_remove <- c("ALDH1A3", "DDAH2", "MLPH", "ZNF383", "ERI1", "C19orf47", "XPO7")

# Remove rows if rownames are in genes_to_remove
res_MT_nonMT_sig2 <- res_MT_nonMT_sig[!rownames(res_MT_nonMT_sig) %in% genes_to_remove, ]
res_MT_nonMT_sig2


```

```{r}
dds_rna_matrix_normalized_final <- rna_matrix_normalized_final[rownames(rna_matrix_normalized_final) %in% rownames(res_MT_nonMT_sig2), ]
dds_rna_matrix_normalized_final


```



```{r}
rna_matrix_normalized_final <- rna_matrix_normalized_final[rownames(rna_matrix_normalized_final) %in% rownames(res_MT_nonMT_sig2), ]
# Remove rows if row names are in genes_to_remove
# rna_matrix_normalized_final 

rna_matrix_normalized_final <- as.data.frame(rna_matrix_normalized_final)
rna_matrix_normalized_final

```

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
vsd <- vst(dds_default_2, blind = TRUE)

vsd_filtered <- vsd[rownames(vsd) %in% rownames(res_MT_nonMT_sig2), ]

vst_matrix <- assay(vsd_filtered)
vst_matrix

```



```{r}
library(dplyr)

samplesheet2_2 <- samplesheet2 %>% filter(class != "N")
samplesheet2_2


```


```{r}
vst_df <- as.data.frame(vst_matrix)

vst_df_MT <- vst_df[,colnames(vst_df) %in% rownames(samplesheet2_2)]

vst_df_MT

```


```{r}
svd_result <- svd(scale(vst_df_MT))  # Perform SVD
svd_df <- as.data.frame(svd_result$v)  # Get right singular vectors
svd_df

(svd_df$project <- samplesheet2_2$Project.ID)

#svd_df$project <- samplesheet2_2$project  
#svd_df$pro
# Test correlation of batch labels with singular vectors
#pvals <- apply(svd_result$v[, 1:5], 2, function(pc) summary(aov(pc ~ svd_df$project))[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1])
#print(pvals)


```



```{r}
(pcs <- svd_result$v[, 1:5])   # Extract first 5 PCs)
(pvals <- apply(pcs, 2, function(pc) t.test(pc ~ svd_df$project)$p.value))  # Perform t-test
print(pvals)  # Print p-values


```
